name: fastify-ata
description: Fastify plugin for ata-validator. Runtime-competitive with the default, 24x faster serverless cold start, Standard Schema V1.

scripts.test: node test.js && node test-pretty-errors.js && node test-standalone.js && node test-compiler.js && node test-type-provider.js && node test-t-builder.js && tsc -p tsconfig.types.json
